description_long: This is a multi-story residential house surrounded by lush greenery and situated on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and street access. The front facade features a prominent bay window section, multiple large windows, and a landscaped entrance with shrubs and trees. The building is primarily light-colored, with a flat roof and clean, modern lines, and is bordered by mature trees on all sides. Vehicles are parked along the street and driveway, indicating urban or suburban context. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with regular window placements and minimal ornamentation. The overall design suggests a blend of modern and traditional architectural elements, with an emphasis on symmetry and natural integration.
description: A multi-story, light-colored house with a flat roof, bay window, and landscaped surroundings, set in an urban neighborhood with street and driveway access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, bay window, landscaped yard, and parked vehicles along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, flat roof, and dense tree coverage along the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view with regular window placement, minimal ornamentation, and thick greenery along the property edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's length, flat roof, and additional street access with parked cars.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, landscaped approach, and prominent bay window
